requirement_topic.en: Small Parts — Toys for Children up to and including 36 Months
requirement_topic.zh: 小零件——36个月及以下儿童玩具
requirement_topic.zht: 小零件——36個月及以下兒童玩具

summary.en: The Australian mandatory standard for toys for children up to and including 36 months addresses small parts that can detach and become choking or ingestion hazards. Assessment should consider the toy as supplied and after reasonably foreseeable use and abuse, including tension, torque, drop, impact, and compression testing referenced through AS/NZS ISO 8124-1.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚36个月及以下儿童玩具强制标准针对可能脱落并造成窒息或吞咽危害的小零件。评估应覆盖玩具供货状态以及合理可预见使用和滥用后的状态，包括通过AS/NZS ISO 8124-1引用的拉力、扭力、跌落、冲击和压缩测试。
summary.zht: 澳洲36個月及以下兒童玩具強制標準針對可能脫落並造成窒息或吞嚥危害的小零件。評估應覆蓋玩具供貨狀態以及合理可預見使用和濫用後的狀態，包括通過AS/NZS ISO 8124-1引用的拉力、扭力、跌落、衝擊和壓縮測試。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Goods (Toys for Children up to and including 36 Months of Age) Safety Standard
AS/NZS ISO 8124.1 — Safety of toys — Safety aspects related to mechanical and physical properties

summary.en: GB 6675.2 includes small-parts and abuse-testing concepts for toys intended for young children and is technically close to ISO 8124-1. However, China test reports may use Chinese classifications, sample conditioning, report language, and scope statements that do not directly demonstrate compliance with the Australian legal instrument.
summary.zh: GB 6675.2包含面向低龄儿童玩具的小零件和滥用测试概念，技术上接近ISO 8124-1。但中国检测报告可能采用中国分类、样品调节、报告语言和范围表述，不能直接证明符合澳大利亚法律文书。
summary.zht: GB 6675.2包含面向低齡兒童玩具的小零件和濫用測試概念，技術上接近ISO 8124-1。但中國檢測報告可能採用中國分類、樣品調節、報告語言和範圍表述，不能直接證明符合澳洲法律文書。

standards_or_laws: GB 6675.2-2014 — Safety of toys — Mechanical and physical properties
GB 6675.1-2014 — Safety of toys — Basic code

gap.en: The main gap is documentary and age-grading proof rather than only test mechanics. Suppliers should ensure the Australian test report identifies the exact product, age claim, detachable components, foreseeable abuse sequence, and small-parts outcome under the Australian mandatory standard.
gap.zh: 主要差距不仅在测试方法，还在文件和年龄分级证明。供应商应确保澳大利亚测试报告列明准确产品、年龄声明、可拆卸部件、可预见滥用测试顺序以及强制标准下的小零件结论。
gap.zht: 主要差距不僅在測試方法，還在文件和年齡分級證明。供應商應確保澳洲測試報告列明準確產品、年齡聲明、可拆卸部件、可預見濫用測試順序以及強制標準下的小零件結論。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — covered toys for children up to and including 36 months must meet the Australian mandatory standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for covered China toy categories — GB 6675.2 / CCC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat small-parts compliance as a high-priority Australian entry gate for infant and toddler toys. A China GB 6675.2 report should be reviewed, but a report expressly tied to the Australian mandatory standard and AS/NZS ISO 8124.1 is the safer evidence package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】应将小零件合规视为婴幼儿玩具进入澳大利亚的高优先级门槛。中国GB 6675.2报告应予审阅，但明确对应澳大利亚强制标准和AS/NZS ISO 8124.1的报告是更稳妥的证据包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】應將小零件合規視為嬰幼兒玩具進入澳洲的高優先級門檻。中國GB 6675.2報告應予審閱，但明確對應澳洲強制標準和AS/NZS ISO 8124.1的報告是更穩妥的證據包。
